html:
Exclusive to:

Barnacle Pita is a Crock Pot recipe exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is made of 1 Barnacles or 1 Cooked Barnacles and at least 0.5 Vegetables. Fillers can be anything.

Adding a total value of 1 or more Fishes may result in Stuffed Fish Heads.

Recipe

×0.5

Examples

Trivia

  • Barnacle Pita was introduced in the Troubled Waters update.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“Barnacles taste better when you can't see them.”
–Wilson
“Pita pita, barnacle eater.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang like chewy food pocket.”
–Wolfgang
“My pita is filled with disappointment.”
–Wendy

–Wickerbottom
“I'm not picky.”
–Woodie
“I suppose I'll eat it if there's nothing else.”
–Maxwell
“Why hide the meat within this bready pöcket?”
–Wigfrid
“It's a little pocket of chewiness!”
–Webber
“An unconventional combination of ingredients, but delicious nonetheless!”
–Warly
“Goes in belly now”
–Wormwood
“That's good eatin!”
–Winona
“Unless this pocket is filled with souls, I'll pass.”
–Wortox
“Don't like it!”
–Wurt
“Further proof that anything can be a sandwich.”
–Walter
“The barnacles fit quite nicely in that bread pocket.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Barnacle Pita là công thức Nồi Hầm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được làm từ 1 Hàu hoặc 1 Hàu nấu chín và ít nhất 0,5 Rau. Chất độn có thể là bất cứ thứ gì.

'''Barnacle Pita''' is a [[Crock Pot]] recipe exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is made of 1 [[Barnacles]] or 1 [[Cooked Barnacles]] and at least 0.5 [[Vegetables]]. Fillers can be anything.

Adding a total value of 1 or more [[Fishes]] may result in [[Stuffed Fish Heads]].

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Barnacle
|item2 = Vegetables
|count2 = 0.5
|item3 = Filler
|item4 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Barnacle Pita
}}
== {{pic|32|Crock Pot}} Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Barnacle
|item2 = Green Cap
|item3 = Twigs
|item4 = Twigs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Barnacle Pita
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Barnacle
|item2 = Ripe Stone Fruit
|item3 = Twigs
|item4 = Twigs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Barnacle Pita
}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* Barnacle Pita was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Troubled Waters|Troubled Waters]]'' update.
